title: MarioKI "The First City" - {Fabric}
description: Private friend "The First City ($50,000 MrBeast Mod)" Modpack.
body:
This is an exploration modpack.

A modpack that takes as its main feature the mod "The First City ($50,000 MrBeast Mod)".
Original modlink: [https://modrinth.com/mod/the-first-city](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-first-city)

The creators of the mod are:
“Refresh Studios” as an “Organization”, "AmyMialee" as "Member", “HellionGames” as a “Member”, "iChun" as a "member", “Luxintrus” as a “member”, “Pyrofab” as a “member”, “RAT” as “Member”, "YUNGNICKYOUNG" as "Owner".

As an addition, I have added several other well-known mods that simplify and enhance the gaming experience.

I hope you like my first "Fabric" modpack.
